name: forum-showcase
description: Forum: accountable multi-agent orchestration with a witnessed causal ledger you can replay.

steps.title: What Forum is
steps.command: echo forum - accountable multi-agent orchestration with a replayable ledger
steps.narration: Forum is where many agents work together and every move is written down. It routes a request to the right lane and keeps a causal ledger of what actually happened.

steps.title: The capability surface
steps.narration: Look at the range: route work, import an external agent trace into a verifiable ledger, grade a run with checks that can actually fail, and mine a session into gradable data. It is a flight recorder for agent teams.

steps.title: A status receipt
steps.narration: Forum reports its own readiness as a receipt. The orchestrator that grades everyone else is honest enough to grade itself first, and that is exactly the property you want at the center of a swarm.
